transcript: Speaker A: You can understand English, but when you try to speak, the words just don't come. You've been learning passively for years, but almost never putting it out. When it's time to speak, your brain doesn't know what to do because you've never practiced producing words under pressure. The fix is simple: build sentences out loud and get corrected in real time. That's what happens in every conversation with me. You speak, I respond, and I correct your mistakes immediately. Talk to me today.
on_screen_text: you can understand English but when you try to speak the words just don't come... you've been learning English passively... build sentences out loud... get corrected real time... talk to me today
summary: An AI avatar explains that passive learning prevents English students from speaking fluently. She offers a solution through active, real-time conversational practice with her. The ad encourages users to start speaking and get immediate corrections.
